title: MetacognitiveEvaluation
description: A single metacognitive evaluation event emitted by the Metacognition & Monitoring Layer. Encodes confidence, deviation z-score, and error flags from monitoring Phase 6 outputs (executive-agent + motor-output). Neuroanatomical analogue: ACC error detection + Prefrontal Cortex BA10 confidence estimation.

evaluation_id.description: Globally unique identifier for this evaluation event (UUID v4).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this evaluation was computed.

task_type.description: Goal class / task type being evaluated. Matches ExecutiveGoal task type label.

task_confidence.description: Confidence score for this task type: f(rolling_mean_reward_delta, success_rate). Higher = more confident. Threshold breach triggers request_correction A2A task.

deviation_score.description: Rolling mean deviation_score from MotorFeedback over the observation window.

deviation_zscore.description: Z-score of deviation_score relative to rolling mean and std: (deviation_score - mu) / sigma. High z-score indicates anomalous deviation.

success_rate.description: Rolling success rate over the observation window for this task type.

reward_delta.description: Mean reward delta over the rolling window. Positive = improving; negative = degrading.

escalation_rate.description: Fraction of recent episodes that triggered escalation (motor-output escalate=True).

retry_count_mean.description: Mean retry_count over the observation window.

policy_denial_rate.description: Fraction of BDI deliberation cycles where the OPA policy denied an action.

error_detected.description: True if deviation_zscore > deviation_error_threshold. Triggers alert and optional request_correction A2A task.

correction_triggered.description: True if a request_correction A2A task was sent to executive-agent in response to this evaluation.

alert_window_elapsed.description: True if task_confidence has been below confidence_threshold for at least alert_window_minutes.

trace_id.description: Optional. OTel trace ID from the monitored request span.

source_feedback_ids.description: Optional. action_ids from MotorFeedback records that contributed to this evaluation window.

session_id.description: Optional. Session scope for report generation.
